name: Apple Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Apples, peeled and chopped fine
4 tablespoons Cold apple juice or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix together dry ingredients in a bowl.
3. Cut in shortening using your fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in apples and raisins. Gradually add enough cold apple juice or water to form a stiff dough.
5. Turn off heat.
6. Place dough on a floured surface and roll out to about 1/2 inch thickness.
7. Cut into triangles using a sharp knife.
8. Bake on a lined cookie sheet for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
